MERGE (cve_1:CVE {id:'CVE-2022-30190'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_1.summary = 'Follina is a vulnerability in the Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool (MSDT) that allows remote code execution through the ms-msdt protocol handler scheme; can be exploited via specially crafted Word documents using remote template to load malicious HTML and execute PowerShell, and also via RTF.',
  cve_1.published_date = date('2022-01-01')
ON MATCH SET
  cve_1.summary = CASE WHEN cve_1.summary IS NULL OR cve_1.summary = '' THEN 'Follina is a vulnerability in the Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool (MSDT) that allows remote code execution through the ms-msdt protocol handler scheme; can be exploited via specially crafted Word documents using remote template to load malicious HTML and execute PowerShell, and also via RTF.' ELSE cve_1.summary END,
  cve_1.published_date = CASE WHEN cve_1.published_date IS NULL THEN date('2022-01-01') ELSE cve_1.published_date END
MERGE (tool_1:Tool {name:'Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool (MSDT)'})
ON CREATE SET
  tool_1.summary = 'Windows component targeted by Follina (CVE-2022-30190), involving the ms-msdt protocol handler scheme.'
ON MATCH SET
  tool_1.summary = CASE WHEN tool_1.summary IS NULL OR tool_1.summary = '' THEN 'Windows component targeted by Follina (CVE-2022-30190), involving the ms-msdt protocol handler scheme.' ELSE tool_1.summary END
MERGE (tech_1:Technique {technique_id:'T1204'})
ON CREATE SET
  tech_1.name = 'User Execution',
  tech_1.tactic = 'Execution',
  tech_1.summary = 'Follina exploitation can be triggered via a specially crafted Word document (and RTF) that causes execution of attacker-controlled code.'
ON MATCH SET
  tech_1.name = CASE WHEN tech_1.name IS NULL OR tech_1.name = '' THEN 'User Execution' ELSE tech_1.name END,
  tech_1.tactic = CASE WHEN tech_1.tactic IS NULL OR tech_1.tactic = '' THEN 'Execution' ELSE tech_1.tactic END,
  tech_1.summary = CASE WHEN tech_1.summary IS NULL OR tech_1.summary = '' THEN 'Follina exploitation can be triggered via a specially crafted Word document (and RTF) that causes execution of attacker-controlled code.' ELSE tech_1.summary END
MERGE (tech_2:Technique {technique_id:'T1059.001'})
ON CREATE SET
  tech_2.name = 'PowerShell',
  tech_2.tactic = 'Execution',
  tech_2.summary = 'Follina exploitation chain ultimately enables loading and executing PowerShell code on Windows.'
ON MATCH SET
  tech_2.name = CASE WHEN tech_2.name IS NULL OR tech_2.name = '' THEN 'PowerShell' ELSE tech_2.name END,
  tech_2.tactic = CASE WHEN tech_2.tactic IS NULL OR tech_2.tactic = '' THEN 'Execution' ELSE tech_2.tactic END,
  tech_2.summary = CASE WHEN tech_2.summary IS NULL OR tech_2.summary = '' THEN 'Follina exploitation chain ultimately enables loading and executing PowerShell code on Windows.' ELSE tech_2.summary END
MERGE (mal_1:Malware {name:'Follina Exploit'})
ON CREATE SET
  mal_1.family = 'Exploit',
  mal_1.summary = 'Exploitation of CVE-2022-30190 (Follina) via ms-msdt protocol handler, commonly delivered through crafted Word/RTF documents that load remote templates/HTML and execute PowerShell.'
ON MATCH SET
  mal_1.family = CASE WHEN mal_1.family IS NULL OR mal_1.family = '' THEN 'Exploit' ELSE mal_1.family END,
  mal_1.summary = CASE WHEN mal_1.summary IS NULL OR mal_1.summary = '' THEN 'Exploitation of CVE-2022-30190 (Follina) via ms-msdt protocol handler, commonly delivered through crafted Word/RTF documents that load remote templates/HTML and execute PowerShell.' ELSE mal_1.summary END
MERGE (mal_1)-[rel_1:exploits]->(cve_1)
ON CREATE SET
  rel_1.evidence = 'Follina (CVE-2022-30190) in MSDT allows remote code execution via the ms-msdt protocol handler; exploited by crafted Word documents (remote template to load malicious HTML) and via RTF, leading to execution of PowerShell.'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_1.evidence = CASE WHEN rel_1.evidence IS NULL OR rel_1.evidence = '' THEN 'Follina (CVE-2022-30190) in MSDT allows remote code execution via the ms-msdt protocol handler; exploited by crafted Word documents (remote template to load malicious HTML) and via RTF, leading to execution of PowerShell.' ELSE rel_1.evidence END
MERGE (mal_1)-[rel_2:uses]->(tool_1)
ON CREATE SET
  rel_2.evidence = 'CVE-2022-30190 is a vulnerability in Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool (MSDT) enabling remote code execution via ms-msdt protocol handler.'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_2.evidence = CASE WHEN rel_2.evidence IS NULL OR rel_2.evidence = '' THEN 'CVE-2022-30190 is a vulnerability in Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool (MSDT) enabling remote code execution via ms-msdt protocol handler.' ELSE rel_2.evidence END
MERGE (mal_1)-[rel_3:uses]->(tech_1)
ON CREATE SET
  rel_3.evidence = 'The vulnerability can be easily exploited by a specially crafted Word document (and also via RTF).'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_3.evidence = CASE WHEN rel_3.evidence IS NULL OR rel_3.evidence = '' THEN 'The vulnerability can be easily exploited by a specially crafted Word document (and also via RTF).' ELSE rel_3.evidence END
MERGE (mal_1)-[rel_4:uses]->(tech_2)
ON CREATE SET
  rel_4.evidence = 'The HTML file ultimately allows the attacker to load and execute PowerShell code within Windows.'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_4.evidence = CASE WHEN rel_4.evidence IS NULL OR rel_4.evidence = '' THEN 'The HTML file ultimately allows the attacker to load and execute PowerShell code within Windows.' ELSE rel_4.evidence END

MERGE (src1:Source {id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022'})
ON CREATE SET src1.title = 'Royal ransomware overview (Jan 2022 - Nov 2022)', src1.publisher = 'Unknown', src1.url = NULL
WITH src1
MERGE (ta1:ThreatActor {name:'Royal'})
ON CREATE SET ta1.summary = 'Ransomware operators who branded themselves as Royal; emerged/distributing Royal ransomware from Jan 2022; primarily focused on targeting entities within the U.S.; activity ramped up in Sep 2022; observed using other operators’ encryptors such as BlackCat.'
ON MATCH SET ta1.summary = CASE WHEN (ta1.summary IS NULL OR trim(ta1.summary) = '') THEN 'Ransomware operators who branded themselves as Royal; emerged/distributing Royal ransomware from Jan 2022; primarily focused on targeting entities within the U.S.; activity ramped up in Sep 2022; observed using other operators’ encryptors such as BlackCat.' ELSE ta1.summary END
MERGE (ta2:ThreatActor {name:'DEV-0569'})
ON CREATE SET ta2.summary = 'Temporary name used by Microsoft to attribute the distribution of Royal ransomware initially.'
ON MATCH SET ta2.summary = CASE WHEN (ta2.summary IS NULL OR trim(ta2.summary) = '') THEN 'Temporary name used by Microsoft to attribute the distribution of Royal ransomware initially.' ELSE ta2.summary END
MERGE (ta2)-[r_alias1:has_alias {date: date('2022-01-01')}]->(ta1)
WITH src1, ta1, ta2, r_alias1
MERGE (ta2)-[sb1:supported_by {page:'', quote:'Initially, Microsoft attributed the distribution of Royal ransomware to DEV-0569 - a temporary name given by the tech company.'}]->(src1)
MERGE (ta1)-[sb2:supported_by {page:'', quote:'Researchers are stating that the threat actors behind Royal ransomware have officially branded themselves with the name Royal.'}]->(src1)
WITH src1, ta1
MERGE (mal1:Malware {name:'Royal ransomware'})
ON CREATE SET mal1.family = 'Ransomware', mal1.summary = 'Ransomware strain emerging in Jan 2022; distributed by the Royal operators; uses the .Royal extension for encrypted files; described as secure encryption that cannot be broken per cited analyst.'
ON MATCH SET mal1.family = CASE WHEN (mal1.family IS NULL OR trim(mal1.family) = '') THEN 'Ransomware' ELSE mal1.family END,
              mal1.summary = CASE WHEN (mal1.summary IS NULL OR trim(mal1.summary) = '') THEN 'Ransomware strain emerging in Jan 2022; distributed by the Royal operators; uses the .Royal extension for encrypted files; described as secure encryption that cannot be broken per cited analyst.' ELSE mal1.summary END
MERGE (ta1)-[r_use1:uses {date: date('2022-01-01'), evidence:'Threat actors behind the operation distribute Royal ransomware.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(mal1)
WITH src1, ta1, mal1
MERGE (tech1:Technique {technique_id:'T1566', name:'Phishing', tactic:'Initial Access'})
ON CREATE SET tech1.summary = 'Delivery via malicious attachments (phishing).'
ON MATCH SET tech1.summary = CASE WHEN (tech1.summary IS NULL OR trim(tech1.summary) = '') THEN 'Delivery via malicious attachments (phishing).' ELSE tech1.summary END
MERGE (tech2:Technique {technique_id:'T1583', name:'Acquire Infrastructure', tactic:'Resource Development'})
ON CREATE SET tech2.summary = 'Distribution via malicious advertisements as part of campaign delivery.'
ON MATCH SET tech2.summary = CASE WHEN (tech2.summary IS NULL OR trim(tech2.summary) = '') THEN 'Distribution via malicious advertisements as part of campaign delivery.' ELSE tech2.summary END
WITH src1, ta1, mal1, tech1, tech2
MERGE (inc1:Incident {id:'royal-activity-start-2022-01'})
ON CREATE SET inc1.date = date('2022-01-01'), inc1.type = 'ransomware', inc1.summary = 'Royal ransomware emerged in January 2022 and began being distributed by ransomware threat actors from previous operations.'
ON MATCH SET inc1.date = CASE WHEN inc1.date IS NULL THEN date('2022-01-01') ELSE inc1.date END,
              inc1.type = CASE WHEN (inc1.type IS NULL OR trim(inc1.type) = '') THEN 'ransomware' ELSE inc1.type END,
              inc1.summary = CASE WHEN (inc1.summary IS NULL OR trim(inc1.summary) = '') THEN 'Royal ransomware emerged in January 2022 and began being distributed by ransomware threat actors from previous operations.' ELSE inc1.summary END
MERGE (inc1)-[r_attr1:attributed_to {confidence:'medium', evidence:'Researchers state the operators branded themselves as Royal.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(ta1)
MERGE (inc1)-[r_mal1:involved_malware {evidence:'Royal ransomware associated with the operation emerging in Jan 2022.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(mal1)
MERGE (inc1)-[r_t1:used_technique {phase:'Initial Access', details:'malicious attachments', evidence:'Some Royal ransomware campaigns distribute the malware via malicious attachments.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(tech1)
MERGE (inc1)-[r_t2:used_technique {phase:'Initial Access', details:'malicious advertisements', evidence:'Some distribute the malware via malicious advertisements.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(tech2)
WITH src1, ta1, mal1
MERGE (inc2:Incident {id:'royal-ramp-up-2022-09'})
ON CREATE SET inc2.date = date('2022-09-01'), inc2.type = 'ransomware', inc2.summary = 'In September 2022, operators behind Royal ransomware began ramping up malicious activities; observed utilizing other ransomware operations’ encryptors such as BlackCat.'
ON MATCH SET inc2.date = CASE WHEN inc2.date IS NULL THEN date('2022-09-01') ELSE inc2.date END,
              inc2.type = CASE WHEN (inc2.type IS NULL OR trim(inc2.type) = '') THEN 'ransomware' ELSE inc2.type END,
              inc2.summary = CASE WHEN (inc2.summary IS NULL OR trim(inc2.summary) = '') THEN 'In September 2022, operators behind Royal ransomware began ramping up malicious activities; observed utilizing other ransomware operations’ encryptors such as BlackCat.' ELSE inc2.summary END
MERGE (inc2)-[r_attr2:attributed_to {confidence:'medium', evidence:'Operators behind Royal ransomware ramped up activity in Sep 2022.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(ta1)
MERGE (inc2)-[r_mal2:involved_malware {evidence:'Royal ransomware operation activity ramp-up.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(mal1)
WITH src1, ta1, inc2, mal1
MERGE (mal2:Malware {name:'BlackCat'})
ON CREATE SET mal2.family = 'Ransomware', mal2.summary = 'Encryptor from another ransomware operation reportedly utilized by Royal operators.'
ON MATCH SET mal2.family = CASE WHEN (mal2.family IS NULL OR trim(mal2.family) = '') THEN 'Ransomware' ELSE mal2.family END,
              mal2.summary = CASE WHEN (mal2.summary IS NULL OR trim(mal2.summary) = '') THEN 'Encryptor from another ransomware operation reportedly utilized by Royal operators.' ELSE mal2.summary END
MERGE (ta1)-[r_use2:uses {date: date('2022-09-01'), evidence:'Observed utilizing other ransomware operation’s encryptors, such as BlackCat.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(mal2)
MERGE (inc2)-[r_mal3:involved_malware {evidence:'Observed utilizing other ransomware operation’s encryptors, such as BlackCat.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(mal2)
WITH src1, ta1, mal1
MERGE (vic1:Victim {name:'Silverstone Circuit'})

              vic1.country_iso2 = CASE WHEN (vic1.country_iso2 IS NULL OR trim(vic1.country_iso2) = '') THEN 'GB' ELSE vic1.country_iso2 END,
              vic1.summary = CASE WHEN (vic1.summary IS NULL OR trim(vic1.summary) = '') THEN 'United Kingdom racing circuit; victim of a ransomware attack claimed by Royal in Nov 2022; attack held up events.' ELSE vic1.summary END
MERGE (ct1:Country {iso2:'GB'})

ON MATCH SET ct1.name = CASE WHEN (ct1.name IS NULL OR trim(ct1.name) = '') THEN 'United Kingdom' ELSE ct1.name END
MERGE (vic1)-[:located_in]->(ct1)
WITH src1, ta1, mal1, vic1, ct1
MERGE (inc3:Incident {id:'royal-silverstone-2022-11'})
ON CREATE SET inc3.date = date('2022-11-01'), inc3.type = 'ransomware', inc3.summary = 'By November 2022, Royal took responsibility for a ransomware attack on Silverstone Circuit in the UK; details were not disclosed; attack held up events.'
ON MATCH SET inc3.date = CASE WHEN inc3.date IS NULL THEN date('2022-11-01') ELSE inc3.date END,
              inc3.type = CASE WHEN (inc3.type IS NULL OR trim(inc3.type) = '') THEN 'ransomware' ELSE inc3.type END,
              inc3.summary = CASE WHEN (inc3.summary IS NULL OR trim(inc3.summary) = '') THEN 'By November 2022, Royal took responsibility for a ransomware attack on Silverstone Circuit in the UK; details were not disclosed; attack held up events.' ELSE inc3.summary END
MERGE (inc3)-[r_attr3:attributed_to {confidence:'medium', evidence:'Royal took responsibility for a ransomware attack on Silverstone Circuit by Nov 2022.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(ta1)
MERGE (inc3)-[r_tgt1:targets {date: date('2022-11-01'), evidence:'Royal took responsibility for a ransomware attack on Silverstone Circuit.', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(vic1)
MERGE (inc3)-[r_mal4:involved_malware {evidence:'Ransomware attack claimed by Royal (Royal ransomware operation).', source_id:'text-royal-ransomware-jan2022-nov2022', page:''}]->(mal1)
MERGE (inc3)-[:occurred_in]->(ct1)
WITH src1, ta1, mal1, inc3
MERGE (inc3)-[sb3:supported_by {page:'', quote:'By November 2022, Royal took responsibility for a ransomware attack on ... Silverstone Circuit.'}]->(src1)
MERGE (ta1)-[sb4:supported_by {page:'', quote:'In September 2022, the operators behind Royal ransomware began ramping up their malicious activities.'}]->(src1)
MERGE (mal1)-[sb5:supported_by {page:'', quote:'After emerging in January 2022, Royal ransomware is a ransomware strain...'}]->(src1)
